title: Slash SaaS Costs: Build Your Own AI CRM with Chinese Models! #shorts
summary: Organizations are moving away from expensive SaaS CRM platforms to build their own AI-powered alternatives using cost-effective Chinese AI models. This reflects a broader trend toward in-house AI solutions to reduce operational expenses.
writeup: This short covers a shift away from expensive SaaS CRM platforms toward in-house, AI-powered CRM systems built on cost-effective Chinese AI models. The takeaway is that organizations are using cheaper inference to replace recurring CRM subscription costs. It frames this as part of a broader move toward building AI solutions internally to cut operational expenses.
